posts.title: The 2026 Iran War: one unsigned page stands between the world and cheaper oil
posts.excerpt: A near-finished peace deal sits unsigned while US and Iranian forces still trade fire and 325 tankers wait behind a minefield. Inside the 2026 Iran war, and the one strait holding the world’s oil hostage.

posts.title: The Oil Shock and India: Crude, the Rupee, and Inflation
posts.excerpt: Brent above $100 on the Hormuz crisis, the rupee at record lows, the CAD set to double, how the oil shock is hitting India's markets, rupee and inflation.

posts.title: The end of the easing cycle: what the RBI’s June pause means for investors
posts.excerpt: The RBI held the repo rate at 5.25% for a third meeting, quietly closing the easing cycle. What the June pause means for the rupee, bonds and your portfolio.

posts.title: Indian IT Stocks: What’s Actually Breaking, and Why the Market Stopped Paying Up
posts.excerpt: TCS, Infosys and Wipro returned ₹1.09 lakh crore to shareholders since 2020 and spend under 1% of revenue on R&D. Why the market is repricing Indian IT.
